prompt: Ultra-realistic luxury magazine cover featuring two elegant Korean women in complementary bridal couture editorial looks. Woman 1: a dramatic off-shoulder ivory duchess satin ball gown with cathedral train and 3D floral appliqué at the bodice. Woman 2: a sleek bias-cut blush silk slip dress with spaghetti straps and a delicate lace overlay cape. Both have long voluminous soft dark waves — one pinned into a romantic side-swept updo, one loose. Luminous porcelain skin, soft rosy dewy makeup, petal-pink glossy lips, feathery lashes. Layered diamond and pearl jewelry on both — chandelier earrings, layered necklaces, ring stacks. Posed intimately — one woman's head resting gently on the other's shoulder, both gazing softly into camera. Background: seamless warm champagne studio with soft diffused bridal lighting and rose petal scatter on floor. "VOGUE" classic serif masthead. 85mm lens, ultra-detailed satin and lace, 8K photorealistic romantic. Negative: harsh light, cartoon, blurry, distorted anatomy, watermark. 1744x2336
